ideas.title: Mobile App (React Native)
ideas.description: DROP до стабильного боевого режима (ROADMAP v2.1).

features.title: Live-пилот $10-50K собственных средств
features.description: Capital Ladder L1. Полный цикл на mainnet через Safe. Цель — доказать исполнение, не доход. Первый реальный доллар важнее десятого аналитического модуля.

features.title: ERC-4626 vault (Conservative) + fee-модуль
features.description: ex RB-303. Vault хранит и учитывает; решения из off-chain ядра через executor-модуль с ограничениями. Mgmt fee стрим + perf fee high-watermark. Solidity-ревью внешним контрактором.

features.title: Bug bounty (Immunefi)
features.description: Пул $50-250K (резерв). Scope: vault + executor. Запуск после аудита #1.

features.title: Интеграции: Safe Apps, DeBank, Zapper
features.description: ERC-4626 = автоматическая совместимость. Листинги и интеграционные PR — дистрибуция без BD.

features.title: Vault-профили Balanced + Aggressive, vault-фабрика
features.description: spaUSD-B (6-8%) и spaUSD-A (8-12%, capped Ethena/credit) после 6 мес работы Conservative. Сегментация мандатов.

features.title: Аудиты #2-3 + security-мониторинг (Hypernative/Forta)
features.description: Второй аудит другой фирмой — требование ступеней L4/L5 Capital Ladder. Real-time security-фиды.

features.title: Команда: +smart-contract инженер, +0.5 ops
features.description: Bus factor = 1 — главный риск (GRAND_VISION §6). Найм с гейта live-пилота. Документация передаваемости.

DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeCrossSleeveNettingGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A multi-sleeve vault charges a PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS gains of its WINNING sleeves WITHOUT netting concurrent LOSING sleeves in the same fee period (no cross-sleeve loss offset), so the depositor pays a fee on sleeve winners even when the vault's NET return across all sleeves is far lower or negative. fee_frac=clamp(fee/100); offset_loss=max(0,gross_winner-net_portfolio); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,gross_winner); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,net_portfolio); netting_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair_fee) (fee on offset winners, never netted); net_return_after_fee=net_portfolio-fee_charged; overstatement=netting_gap; fee_on_unnetted_fraction=clamp(netting_gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio with net_fair<=0 edge mirroring hurdle/clawback template. inputs: gross_winner_gain_pct (REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA), net_portfolio_gain_pct (signed, may be <winners or <0, default 0), performance_fee_pct (coerced 0..100), optional sleeve_count. override path: direct netting_gap_pct verbatim (+positive gross_winner & fee_charged), geometry (net/offset/fair)->None, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE flag, geometry-only flags suppressed, realization_ratio anchored to (1-fee_on_unnetted_fraction). classification by fee_on_unnetted_fraction: CLEAN_FULLY_NETTED(<=0.05)/MILD_NETTING_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_NETTING_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_NETTING_GAP(>0.50 or net<0)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. flags CLEAN_FULL_NETTING/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_OFFSET_GAINS(offset>0)/FULL_OFFSET(net<=0 and winners>0)/MANY_SLEEVES(sleeve_count>=4)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*(1-fee_on_unnetted_fraction),0,100). recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_NETTING_GAP/DEMAND_CROSS_SLEEVE_NETTING/AVOID_NO_NETTING; grade A-F; aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_netting_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_cross_sleeve_netting_gap_log.json cap 100), no inf/NaN. Distinct from perf-fee HWM (temporal HWM-reset of one NAV series) / volatility-tax (path asymmetry of one series) / crystallization-frequency (how often) / hurdle-rate-gap (beta vs alpha benchmark) / unrealized-gain-clawback (temporal reversal of one mark) and net-of-loss-yield-realization (yield-vs-loss NAV reconciliation): novel axis = a performance fee charged on GROSS winning sleeves without netting concurrent LOSING sleeves (cross-sectional, contemporaneous, no cross-sleeve offset).

done.title: Sterling Ratio & Burke Ratio Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: spa_core/paper_trading/sterling_burke_ratio.py — read-only/advisory drawdown-based анализатор. Sterling = ann_return/(mean(|episode_depth|)+10%); Burke = ann_return/sqrt(Σ depth²). Отличается от Calmar (только max DD) и Martin (RMS underwater curve). Reuse-by-import: extract_equity_series (drawdown_analytics MP-115), identify_drawdown_episodes (drawdown_attribution MP-127), content_fingerprint (tear_sheet MP-501). Verdict fail/warn/ok по порогам 0.5/1.0; нет просадок → ratios None+ok. Атомарная запись data/sterling_burke_ratio.json (mkstemp+os.replace), идемпотентность, history≤500, CLI --check/--run/--data-dir (exit 0 always). Pure stdlib. 92 unit-теста OK. done.title: CAPM Risk-Decomposition Analyzer — Jensen's Alpha, Treynor Ratio & Modigliani M² (read-only/advisory)
done.description: CAPM benchmark-relative risk decomposition extending benchmark_comparison.py (MP-394) with the risk-adjusted metrics it omitted. Regress portfolio excess return (Rp-Rf) on benchmark excess return (Rm-Rf): beta=cov(Rp,Rm)/var(Rm); Jensen's alpha = mean(Rp)-[Rf+beta*(mean(Rm)-Rf)] (CAPM intercept, annualized geometrically at 365/yr); Treynor=(ann_Rp-ann_Rf)/beta; Modigliani M2 (RAP)=ann_Rf+sharpe_p*sigma_bench_annual with m2_alpha=M2-ann_benchmark; appraisal_ratio=alpha_daily/std(residuals)*sqrt(365); systematic/specific variance split (systematic=beta^2*var(Rm), specific=pvar(residuals), capm_r_squared, pct_systematic_risk); plus beta & correlation. Default flat risk-free benchmark (4.0%) has zero variance -> all CAPM metrics None/ok with honest note; varying benchmark_returns populates everything. Advisory verdict {ok,warn} from annualized Jensen alpha (>=2% ok, <=-2% warn) with <40-obs low-sample cap. MIN_OBS=20. Pure stdlib OLS/cov/var from scratch, read-only, atomic idempotent write, reuses extract_equity_series + content_fingerprint by import. 90 tests, llm_forbidden_lint clean.

done.title: Upside Potential Ratio (UPR) — Upside-Potential / Downside-Risk Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Upside Potential Ratio (Sortino, van der Meer & Plantinga 1999) = upside_potential / downside_deviation about MAR=0, both over ALL n returns. UP = mean(max(r-MAR,0)) (order-1 upper partial moment); DD = sqrt(mean(min(r-MAR,0)^2)) (sqrt of order-2 lower partial moment); UPR = UP/DD with natural 1.0 reference. UPR<0.5 -> fail; UPR<1.0 -> warn. Low-sample guard caps fail->warn when <3 downside obs; degenerate (no downside, DD=0) -> UPR=None/ok. Reuses drawdown_analytics.extract_equity_series + tear_sheet.content_fingerprint by import. Pure stdlib, read-only, atomic write, idempotent, 73 tests.

done.title: Rachev Ratio — Tail-Reward / Tail-Risk Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Rachev Ratio = Expected Tail Gain (mean of best alpha-fraction of returns) / Expected Tail Loss (magnitude of mean of worst beta-fraction). CVaR-style whole-tail reward/risk asymmetry on the equity track. RR<0.6 -> fail (extreme losses dominate extreme gains). Low-sample guard caps fail->warn when a tail has <2 obs. Reuses drawdown_analytics.extract_equity_series + tear_sheet.content_fingerprint by import. Pure stdlib, read-only, atomic write, 61 tests.

done.title: Deflated Sharpe Ratio (DSR) & Multiple-Testing-Adjusted Performance Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Вычисляет Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado): корректирует наблюдаемый Sharpe на множественное тестирование через ожидаемый максимум Sharpe под нулём по N shadow-стратегиям (S0..S5). DSR = PSR против порога sr_star=E[max]. Reuse-by-import: PSR-математика из probabilistic_sharpe + content_fingerprint из tear_sheet. Advisory verdict: DSR<0.5 -> fail (overfitting red-flag).
done.note: 2 new files (spa_core/paper_trading/deflated_sharpe.py + spa_core/tests/test_deflated_sharpe.py); reuses probabilistic_sharpe PSR math (_probabilistic_sharpe/_inv_norm_cdf/_skewness/_excess_kurtosis/_variance_term/_norm_cdf/_daily_returns) and tear_sheet content_fingerprint by import; trial Sharpes from strategy_consolidator converted annualised->daily so SR_obs, V and E[max] share one scale. 48 tests OK.

done.title: Net-of-Cost Performance & Cost-Drag Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Композирует gross APY (MP-117 yield_attribution) и реализованный turnover (MP-121 turnover_analytics) в единую картину net-of-cost: прозрачная модель издержек (variable turnover cost = annualized_turnover×COST_PER_TURNOVER_BPS + fixed gas drag = annualized rebalance freq × GAS_PER_REBALANCE_USD / AUM), net_apy_pct = gross − total_cost_drag_pp, cost_ratio = cost/gross, advisory verdict (fail при net≤0 или cost_ratio>30%; warn при >10%/low-sample; иначе ok). Low-sample (obs<20) → verdict capped at warn. Нулевое дублирование математики — только ЧИТАЕТ выводы двух sibling-анализаторов + переиспользует tear_sheet content_fingerprint.
done.resolution: Строго аддитивный read-only/advisory офлайн pure-stdlib модуль spa_core/paper_trading/cost_drag_analytics.py: компонует build_yield_attribution (MP-117, gross portfolio_apy_pp + aum_usd) и build_turnover_analytics (MP-121, annualized_turnover/num_rebalance_days/num_observations) ИМПОРТОМ — ноль дублирования. compute_cost_components — чистая модель: turnover_cost_pp = annualized_turnover×COST_PER_TURNOVER_BPS/100 (var slippage+fees), gas_drag_pp = (num_rebalance_days/num_observations×365)×GAS_PER_REBALANCE_USD/aum×100 (fixed gas; None при aum≤0 → 0 в тотале); total_cost_drag_pp, net_apy_pct=gross−total, cost_ratio=total/gross. Low-sample (obs<MIN_RELIABLE_OBS=20) → low_sample:true + verdict capped at warn (tiny-sample annualization не даёт confident fail). Verdict: fail при net≤0 или cost_ratio>HIGH(0.30); warn при cost_ratio>MODERATE(0.10)/gross≤0/low-sample; иначе ok. Ассумпции издержек overridable per call и в meta. content_fingerprint ПЕРЕИСПОЛЬЗОВАН ИМПОРТОМ из tear_sheet (same object), персист data/cost_drag_analytics.json атомарно (tmp+os.replace), идемпотентность + ротация history ≤500. CLI --check(дефолт)/--run/--data-dir, exit 0 всегда, мусор→ERROR в stderr. Никогда не raise. На реальном data/: available=true, gross=3.171pp, annualized_turnover=7.44×, obs=1→low_sample, verdict=warn (capped from fail; net отрицателен из-за tiny-sample gas annualization), --run ×2 байт-идентичен (md5 4808a9f1…), 0 *.tmp. 47 unittest-кейсов OK; регрессия test_turnover_analytics+test_yield_attribution 194/194 OK; llm_forbidden_lint exit 0 (files 30→31). STRICTLY READ-ONLY: risk/execution/allocator/cycle_runner/golive_checker/адаптеры/tear_sheet.py/yield_attribution.py/turnover_analytics.py/__init__.py/push_to_github.py/index.html не тронуты — только 2 новых файла + артефакт --run.

done.title: Capital Ladder enforcement в гейтах
done.description: Лестница L0 paper → L5 institutional (ARCHITECTURE_v2 §8) кодом в go-live гейтах. Автоспуск на ступень при инциденте ≥1% AUM.
done.resolution: Capital Ladder enforcement закрыт в v4.24 (строго аддитивно): новый модуль spa_core/governance/capital_ladder.py — лестница ARCHITECTURE_v2 §8 кодом (LADDER: L0 paper $100K virtual → L5 institutional $100M+, frozen dataclass с AUM cap и требованиями подъёма). Детерминированные чистые функции с инжектируемыми входами: detect_incidents — инцидент ≥1% AUM по реальному data/equity_curve_daily.json (close-to-close daily_return_pct ≤ −1% ИЛИ внутридневная open→low ≥ 1%; единицы — проценты, как пишет cycle_runner; ровно 1% — уже инцидент); apply_auto_demotions — автоспуск минус ступень за каждый НОВЫЙ инцидент (дедупликация по processed_incident_dates, пол L0); evaluate_climb — advisory-гейты подъёма на следующую ступень: auto-гейты из данных (golive_ready из data/golive_status.json — вердикт anti-demo гейта MP-006; track_days 30/90/365/730 из paper_trading_status.days_running с fallback на длину equity-ряда; no_incident_days_ge_90) + attest-гейты Owner'а (E2E harness, Safe, аудиты, bug bounty, SOC и т.д. из data/capital_ladder_attestations.json — из данных репо честно НЕ выводимы) + обязательный owner_approval_adr (§8: подъём = ADR + Owner approval — модуль ступень НИКОГДА не поднимает сам, только eligibility). Состояние data/capital_ladder_status.json: атомарная запись (tmp+os.replace), история переходов с ротацией ≤500, терпимость к битому/отсутствующему файлу (дефолт L0). CLI --check (без записи) / --run — офлайн, без сети, без трейсбеков. Интеграция с go-live гейтом — advisory и standalone: golive_checker (MP-006) имеет фиксированный набор критериев без расширяемого реестра, поэтому НЕ модифицирован — модуль потребляет его персистентный вердикт golive_status.json как гейт L0→L1; cycle_runner не тронут. Тесты: test_capital_ladder.py 54/54 OK (unittest, tempdir); регрессия test_agent_runtime+test_ceo_agent+test_strategy_agent 154/154 OK (в test_agent_runtime обновлён ожидаемый набор мандатов: +l2_adapters,+protocol_research — pre-existing failure от параллельных спринтов, не от MP-505); llm_forbidden_lint exit 0. Смоук на реальных данных: L0 paper, 0 инцидентов, climb L0→L1 NOT ELIGIBLE 1/5 (golive_ready PASS; track 23<30 дней; аттестации отсутствуют — честно).

Детерминированное ядро поверх agent runtime v1 (MP-301): gather_context читает реальные data/equity_curve_daily.json + strategy_comparison.json + regime_segmentation.json (отсутствие/битость файла — честная пометка в context.missing, не падение); чистая should_run(context, decisions, now) — триггеры weekly (>=7 дней с последней записи в data/ceo_decisions.json) ИЛИ drawdown >2% от пика equity (compute_drawdown_pct). CeoDecision (ts, snapshot_id, trigger, decision ∈ {keep_strategy, recommend_strategy_change, escalate}, reasoning, inputs_digest, degraded): llm=None → детерминированная эвристика (dd>2% → escalate, иначе keep_strategy) с пометкой [degraded=true]; LLM инжектируется как callable (SDK в spa_core НЕ импортируются), decision валидируется по enum — невалидный/упавший ответ → детерминированный fallback. Журнал data/ceo_decisions.json: append, атомарно (tmp+os.replace), ротация 500. Запуск ТОЛЬКО через AgentRuntime.run_agent с мандатом ceo (бюджет/деградация/forbidden-list guard'ом; check_permission(ceo, initiate_tx) → False закреплено тестом). CLI: --check / --run [--force] офлайн без LLM. CEO ничего не меняет: ни policy, ни whitelist, ни tx — только пишет решения. SLOW_LOOP: run_slow_loop(date, llm_available=False) — деградирует в cached/degraded при LLM недоступен; пишет slow_loop_insights.json. STRATEGIC_LOOP: run_strategic_loop(week_start, llm_available=False) — skip при LLM недоступен; пишет strategic_loop_notes.json. ADAPTER_WATCHDOG: check_adapter_health() — unhealthy при status!=ok ИЛИ apy=0 ИЛИ fetch >2h; attempt_adapter_restart() — rate-limit 3/час (watchdog_state.json), пишет watchdog_log.json + orchestrator_trigger.json; run_watchdog_cycle() — полный прогон с summary watchdog_cycle_result.json. Интеграция в cycle_runner.py: fast_loop + watchdog + slow_loop после каждого цикла; strategic_loop по понедельникам; watchdog также в _run_daily_monitors(). Все записи атомарные. LLM SDK не импортируется в spa_core. Тесты: test_loop_scheduler.py 30+ тестов + test_adapter_watchdog.py 30+ тестов, все зелёные.

done.title: Strategy Agent
done.description: Еженедельно. Historical data + shadow S0-S5 → параметры стратегий, Kelly-sizing (интеграция optimization/), рекомендации селектору. Активную стратегию меняет только детерминированный селектор.
done.resolution: Strategy Agent закрыт в v4.23 (строго аддитивно): новый модуль spa_core/agents/strategy_agent_v2.py (имя _v2 — легаси spa_core/agents/strategy_agent.py занят 4h-агентом multi-strategy backtest; не тронут). Детерминированное ядро поверх agent runtime v1 (MP-301): gather_context читает реальные data/strategy_shadow_comparison.json (shadow S0-S5 от comparator) + equity_curve_daily.json + strategy_comparison.json (отсутствие/битость файла — честная пометка в context.missing, не падение; snapshot_id/inputs_digest = sha256 канонического JSON); чистая should_run(context, recommendations, now) — weekly-триггер (нет записей / >=7 дней). rank_shadow_strategies — ранжирование S0-S5 по реальным метрикам (sortino первичен, sharpe tiebreak, pnl_pct, max_drawdown; гейт eligible >=7 дней истории — зеркалит детерминированный strategy_selector.py). kelly_sizing — интеграция spa_core/optimization/ (dynamic_kelly_fraction, variance-Kelly (μ−r_f)/σ², σ из дневных доходностей equity, risk-free 5% как в markowitz) с честным stdlib-fallback той же математики; рекомендуемый деплой = half-Kelly; Kelly ВСЕГДА детерминированный — LLM не сайзит капитал. StrategyRecommendation (ts, snapshot_id, trigger, recommendation ∈ {recommend_strategy, keep_current}, strategy, kelly, ranking_top3, reasoning, inputs_digest, degraded, advisory_only=True): llm=None → детерминированное ядро с [degraded=true]; LLM — инжектируемый callable (SDK не импортируются), ответ валидируется по enum И по списку реально существующих eligible-стратегий — невалидный/выдуманная стратегия/упавший → детерминированный fallback. Агент НИЧЕГО не меняет: активную стратегию меняет ТОЛЬКО детерминированный селектор — закреплено мандатом spa_core/agent_runtime/mandates/strategy.json (weekly, 15k/30k, allowed_outputs=[data/strategy_recommendations.json], forbidden: change_active_strategy/modify_policy/initiate_tx/modify_risk_limits/modify_whitelist/move_capital, requires_llm=true + degradation_mode=deterministic-only как у alpha). Журнал data/strategy_recommendations.json: append, атомарно (tmp+os.replace), ротация 500. Запуск ТОЛЬКО через AgentRuntime.run_agent; CLI --check / --run [--force] офлайн. Тесты: test_strategy_agent.py 66/66 OK; регрессия test_agent_runtime+test_ceo_agent 88/88; llm_forbidden_lint exit 0.

CLI --check (дефолт: smoke self-test в tempdir, в data/ ничего не пишет)/--gen-key --plan/--run (smoke + атомарный usage-снапшот)/--serve --port: exit 0, без трейсбеков, мусорные аргументы -> ERROR exit 0. Чеки (отсутствующий входной файл -> честный skip+note, не fail): (1) equity_continuity — даты equity_curve_daily строго возрастают без дублей (нарушение fail), gap ровно 2 дня warn / >2 fail, is_demo:true в баре или на верхнем уровне fail, нечисловые equity warn; (2) positions_consistency — сумма позиций+cash vs capital_usd: <=0.5% ok / <=2% warn / дальше fail (float-границы с eps), отрицательные позиции fail; (3) allocation_policy_bounds — advisory-ДУБЛЬ гейта концентрации числовыми константами T1_CAP=0.40/T2_CAP=0.20 (комментарий-ссылка на spa_core/risk/policy.py, RiskPolicy НЕ импортируется), тиры из adapter_orchestrator_status, протокол без тира -> unknown по строгому T2-капу 0.20, сумма весов <=1.0+1e-6, превышение/отрицательный вес fail; (4) freshness — generated_at/last_cycle_ts/ts/timestamp в UTC (Z-суффикс понимается): orchestrator 26h, risk_scores 48h, paper_trading 26h, capacity 48h, golive 48h; старше порога warn, старше 2x fail, битый timestamp warn; (5) anchor_coverage — каждый день трека из equity-кривой от real_track_start=2026-06-10 (сегодняшний незавершённый UTC-день исключается) имеет якорь в proof_of_track_anchors.json: отсутствие warn, discrepancy-note в якоре fail; (6) schema_sanity — все 9 перечисленных артефактов парсятся и dict на верхнем уровне (битый/не тот тип fail), *.tmp-огрызки в data/ fail. Персист: атомарная запись data/data_integrity_status.json (tmp+os.replace), история прогонов с ротацией <=500, идемпотентность по content_fingerprint без generated_at/history/age_hours (паттерн tear_sheet) — повторный --run байт-в-байт не меняет файл (проверено md5 на реальных данных). done.title: Portfolio Concentration & Diversification Analyzer (HHI, read-only/advisory)
done.description: Декомпозиция текущего портфеля на метрики концентрации/диверсификации (Herfindahl-Hirschman Index по протоколам/тирам/AUM). Tear-sheet даёт exposure, но не отвечает на DD-вопрос инвестора 'насколько концентрирован портфель и диверсифицирован ли он'. Модуль считает HHI (whole-AUM и deployed-only), effective number of positions (1/HHI), top-1/top-3 концентрацию, классификацию по стандартным порогам DOJ/FTC (<1500 diversified / 1500-2500 moderate / >2500 concentrated), max-single-position policy (40% AUM) и единый advisory-вердикт.
done.resolution: Строго аддитивный read-only/advisory офлайн pure-stdlib модуль spa_core/paper_trading/concentration_analytics.py: переиспользует build_exposure ИМПОРТОМ из spa_core/reporting/tear_sheet.py как единственный источник весовой математики (ноль дублирования; доказано тестом-равенством breakdown.share == build_exposure share_pct/100). Считает hhi_protocol (whole-AUM) + hhi_protocol_deployed (renormalized на развёрнутый книга, чтобы кэш-тяжёлый портфель не выглядел ложно диверсифицированным) + hhi_tier, индексы на шкале 0-10000, effective_num_positions=1/HHI, top1/top3 share + top1_protocol, concentration_class по порогам HHI_MODERATE_FLOOR=1500/HHI_CONCENTRATED_FLOOR=2500, max-single-position policy MAX_SINGLE_POSITION_SHARE=0.40 (строго >; ровно 40% не breach) с policy_breaches, единый verdict (fail при breach или concentrated; warn при moderate/unknown-tier; иначе ok). Персист data/concentration_analytics.json атомарно (tmp+os.replace) с идемпотентностью по content_fingerprint (без волатильных generated_at/history) и ротацией истории ≤500. CLI --check(дефолт, без записи)/--run/--data-dir всегда exit 0 без трейсбеков, мусорные аргументы → ERROR в stderr. is_demo честно из источника; missing/broken/empty/garbage входы → honest available:false + notes, никогда не raise. На реальном data/: verdict=fail (deployed-HHI 2523 > 2500 → concentrated), whole-AUM index 2277, hhi_tier 4919, effective_num_positions 3.9641, top1 aave_v3 0.315293, top3 0.731866, policy_ok=true (ни одна позиция не >40%), is_demo=false. 81 новый unittest-кейс (ручной HHI 50/50→5000 / 4×25%→2500 boundary moderate / 5×20% / 10×10%→diversified / single→10000, границы класса 1499/1500/2500/2501, 1/HHI, top1/top3, policy boundary ровно 0.40 vs 0.4001, reuse-равенство с build_exposure, is_demo true/false/absent, толерантность missing/broken/garbage/empty без raise, персист/идемпотентность ×2 байт-в-байт md5 + ротация ровно 500 + нет *.tmp, CLI direct+subprocess junk→ERROR exit0 + --check/--run conflict, import-гигиена через find_forbidden_imports + AST); регрессия test_exit_liquidity+test_tear_sheet 189/189 OK; llm_forbidden_lint exit 0. ПРИМЕЧАНИЕ: оба файла существовали от старой несовместимой попытки SPA-V398 (другие входы portfolio_state.json/target_allocation.json, без reuse/atomic/fingerprint) и полностью перезаписаны под MP-116; ничто в репо не импортировало старый API (проверено grep). STRICTLY READ-ONLY: risk/execution/allocator/cycle_runner/адаптеры/tear_sheet.py/__init__.py/push_to_github.py не тронуты.

done.title: Portfolio Risk Contribution & Risk-Budget Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Декомпозиция портфельного РИСКА (волатильности): объединяет covariance_matrix из covariance_summary.json (MP covariance_export) с весами позиций (build_exposure из tear_sheet) → portfolio volatility sigma_p = sqrt(w'Σw); per-protocol marginal contribution to risk (MCTR), component contribution (CCTR, суммируется в sigma_p), percent risk contribution (PRC, суммируется в 1); risk-HHI (концентрация РИСКА) + effective number of risk sources; diversification ratio; сравнение risk-weight vs capital-weight (кто пере-/недо-набюджетирован по риску); единый advisory-вердикт. Отвечает на DD-вопрос инвестора 'какая позиция реально движет риск портфеля' — отличается от MP-116 (концентрация КАПИТАЛА, HHI весов) и MP-117 (концентрация ДОХОДНОСТИ, yield-HHI): здесь декомпозиция ДИСПЕРСИИ через ковариацию.
done.resolution: Строго аддитивный read-only/advisory офлайн pure-stdlib модуль spa_core/paper_trading/risk_contribution.py: декомпозиция портфельного риска (variance) через covariance_matrix из covariance_summary.json + веса позиций из build_exposure (ИМПОРТ из tear_sheet, единственный источник весовой математики). Per-protocol MCTR/CCTR(сумма==sigma_p)/PRC(сумма==1), risk-HHI + effective number of risk sources, diversification ratio, risk-vs-capital ratio, uncovered-risk bucket с честным known:false при отсутствии covariance-строки. HHI-пороги импортированы из concentration_analytics (MP-116). Маппинг protocol→instrument-slug с детерминированным выбором при нескольких инструментах (нота в notes). Атомарный персист data/risk_contribution.json, идемпотентность по content_fingerprint, ротация ≤500, CLI --check/--run/--data-dir exit 0 always, junk→ERROR stderr exit 0. 58 тестов. done.title: Yield Sustainability & APY-Decay Analyzer (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Per-protocol APY trend / decay analysis from data/apy_history.json: OLS slope (slope_per_day/slope_per_year via pure math, day-index x-axis), early-vs-recent decay_ratio, classification decaying/rising/stable (decaying if slope_per_year<=-DECAY_SLOPE_PP=1.0pp/yr OR decay_ratio<=-DECAY_FRACTION=0.15; rising symmetric; else stable). Headline: num_protocols_analyzed, decaying/rising/stable lists, share_decaying, worst_decay_protocol+slope, avg_slope_per_year, per_protocol breakdown. Advisory verdict: fail при share_decaying>=0.5 (yield edge eroding); warn при share_decaying>0 ИЛИ любой одиночный sharp decay (decay_ratio<=-0.30); иначе ok. Per-protocol usability guard >=MIN_POINTS=7 numeric points; <2 usable protocols → available:false/insufficient_data. Переиспользует tear_sheet content_fingerprint ИМПОРТОМ; никогда не raise.
done.resolution: Строго аддитивный read-only/advisory офлайн pure-stdlib модуль spa_core/paper_trading/yield_decay_analytics.py: для каждого протокола из data/apy_history.json фитит OLS-тренд APY против day-index (ols_slope чистой математикой Σ(x-x̄)(y-ȳ)/Σ(x-x̄)², None при <2 точках или нулевой дисперсии x), считает slope_per_year=slope_per_day×365, start/current/mean APY, apy_volatility (population stdev), early-vs-recent split → decay_ratio=(recent_mean-early_mean)/early_mean (None при early_mean<=0), classification decaying/rising/stable по DECAY_SLOPE_PP=1.0pp/yr и DECAY_FRACTION=0.15. Advisory verdict: fail при current_spread_pp<LOW_SPREAD_PP=0.5 (yields сошлись, мало пространства для отбора); warn при spread_trend_per_year<=CONVERGING_SLOPE_PP_YR=-1.0 ИЛИ leader_share>=LEADER_SHARE_WARN=0.8; иначе ok; verdict_reason всегда. Guard MIN_POINTS=7/MIN_DATES=7/>=2 usable → иначе available:false/insufficient_data, schema стабилен. content_fingerprint ПЕРЕИСПОЛЬЗОВАН ИМПОРТОМ из tear_sheet (same object, доказано assertIs). Персист data/apy_dispersion_analytics.json атомарно (tmp+os.replace, prefix .tmp_apy_dispersion_), идемпотентность по fingerprint (без волатильных generated_at/history), ротация history ровно <=500. CLI --check(дефолт)/--run/--data-dir, exit 0 всегда, мусор→ERROR stderr без traceback, --check/--run конфликт→ERROR exit 0. Никогда не raise. На реальном data/: available=true, verdict=warn (spread shrinking -5.2152pp/yr <= -1.0; opportunity set narrowing), 7 протоколов, 90 дат (2026-02-21…2026-05-21), current_spread=8.5443pp, avg=7.28pp, leader=euler-v2-usdc-ethereum share=28%; --run ×2 байт-идентичен (md5 9e325579fa526556415485f945d83f72), 2-й DATA_UNCHANGED, 0 *.tmp; junk-arg→exit0, --check/--run конфликт→exit0. 121 unittest-кейс OK; регрессия test_yield_decay_analytics(97)+test_correlation_analyzer(75) OK; llm_forbidden_lint status=ok violations=0 exit0 (dirs=3 files=31). done.title: Protocol Liquidity Depth & Slippage Estimator (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Оценивает, насколько можно нарастить позицию в протоколе до значимого APY-slippage. Читает apy_history.json: для каждого протокола строит эмпирическую кривую APY vs TVL (из adapter_status.json), оценивает точку перегиба (где +10% капитала => -X% APY). Выдаёт per-protocol capacity_headroom_usd и advisory verdict (headroom<20% текущего AUM → warn). Pure stdlib, read-only, content_fingerprint из tear_sheet.

done.title: Alpha Persistence & Decay Curve (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Измеряет, как долго держится alpha после входа в протокол. Берёт все entry-события из portfolio_snapshots.json, для каждого считает APY[t+1d], APY[t+7d], APY[t+14d], APY[t+30d] vs APY[t+0] (benchmark на момент входа). Строит decay_curve (список медианных decay_ratio по lag), half_life_days (где decay_ratio=0.5), advisory verdict: half_life < 7 дней → warn (стратегия требует частой ребалансировки). Pure stdlib.

done.title: Position Sizing Optimizer v2 — Kelly + Mean-Variance (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Оптимальные веса портфеля поверх существующих аллокаций. Реализует: (1) Fractional Kelly: f* = (mu - r_f) / sigma^2, кэп 25% на протокол; (2) Mean-Variance (закрытая форма, без scipy): w* = Sigma^-1 * mu / (1^T Sigma^-1 mu). Читает yield_attribution.json и correlation_analyzer.json. Сравнивает Kelly vs MV vs текущие веса. Advisory verdict: если текущие веса отклоняются >20pp от MV-optimal → warn. Pure stdlib (matrix inversion через собственный 3x3/NxN Gauss).

done.title: Walk-Forward Validation Harness (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Добавляет walk-forward backtesting к historical_replay.py. Разбивает историю на N равных окон, в каждом: train → fit аллокатор → test → фиксирует метрики. Считает variance across folds (высокая → стратегия нестабильна), mean OOS Sharpe vs IS Sharpe, overfitting ratio. Advisory verdict: OOS/IS Sharpe < 0.6 → fail. Pure stdlib, импортирует historical_replay.HistoricalReplay.

done.title: Bias Ratio — Return-Smoothing / Mark-Manipulation Detector (read-only/advisory)
done.description: Abdulali Bias Ratio = #{0<=r<=+s} / (1 + #{-s<=r<0}) over daily returns (s = sample std). ~1 honest; >>1 = small losses suppressed / marks smoothed (illiquid/mark-to-model red flag). Reuses drawdown_analytics.extract_equity_series + tear_sheet.content_fingerprint by import; pure stdlib, atomic write, idempotent. fail if BR>3.0; warn if BR>2.0; low-sample guard caps fail->warn when <6 near-zero returns; zero-dispersion -> ok+note.

done.title: PortfolioSnapshotDiff — adapter-level change tracking between consecutive snapshots
done.description: spa_core/analytics/portfolio_snapshot_diff.py: PortfolioSnapshotDiff — advisory/read-only. Compares two consecutive yield_attribution_tracker.json snapshots. Dataclasses: AdapterChange (adapter_key, change_type: added/removed/weight_up/weight_down/apy_up/apy_down/unchanged, old/new weight_pct, old/new apy_pct, weight_delta, apy_delta, is_significant: |weight_delta|>1% or |apy_delta|>0.1%), PortfolioDiff (portfolio APY delta, capital delta, added/removed/significant_changes lists, trend IMPROVING/STABLE/DECLINING, one-line summary). Class PortfolioSnapshotDiff(data_path): load_snapshots (ring-buffer 30 from yield_attribution_tracker.json), get_last_two (raise ValueError if <2), diff_adapters (weight priority over apy in change_type), compute_diff (load from disk when no args), save_diff (atomic tmp+os.replace, ring-buffer 30 → data/snapshot_diff.json), format_telegram_message (≤1500 chars, trend/APY/added/removed/significant), to_dict. done.title: ProtocolDeFiInterestRateKinkProximityAnalyzer
done.description: Quantifies how close a lending market utilization is to the kinked rate-model optimal point: utilization headroom, projected borrow APR now/at-kink/at-full, rate shock if utilization crosses the kink (steep second slope), supply APR, liquidity buffer, and a 0-100 kink_proximity_score (higher=safer). classification AMPLE_HEADROOM..PAST_KINK; grade A-F; flags PAST_KINK/AT_KINK/THIN_LIQUIDITY_BUFFER/STEEP_SECOND_SLOPE/LARGE_RATE_SHOCK/AMPLE_HEADROOM/LOW_UTILIZATION_IDLE/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper. Pure stdlib, read-only/advisory, atomic ring-buffer log (data/interest_rate_kink_proximity_log.json).

done.title: DeFiProtocolBorrowRateVolatilityForecaster
done.description: Forecasts forward volatility/dispersion of a lending market borrow APR over a horizon (utilization volatility amplified by the local rate-model slope) and the impact on net carry for a leveraged/looping farmer: rate_sensitivity_factor, forecast_borrow_apr_vol, p95/p05 borrow-APR cone, net_carry now and at p95 borrow, carry_wipeout_probability (normal-tail via erfc), 0-100 rate_stability_score. classification VERY_STABLE..HIGHLY_VOLATILE; grade A-F; flags HIGH_RATE_VOLATILITY/CARRY_WIPEOUT_RISK/HIGH_UTILIZATION_SENSITIVITY/NEGATIVE_CARRY_AT_P95/THIN_CARRY_MARGIN/STABLE_BORROW_COST/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper. Pure stdlib, read-only/advisory, atomic ring-buffer log (data/borrow_rate_volatility_log.json).

done.title: DeFiProtocolBorrowRateModeOptimizer
done.description: Advisory/read-only: for Aave-style dual-mode borrow markets (stable vs variable), decides which mode minimizes expected borrow cost for a leveraged/looping farmer given current rates + forward variable-rate drift/volatility. Metrics: expected_variable_apr, variable_apr_p95, expected_cost_stable/variable, cost_advantage_variable, worst_case_cost_variable, breakeven_variable_apr, headroom_to_breakeven, net_carry stable/variable/p95, stable_certainty_score, mode_recommendation_score 0-100, recommended_mode STABLE/VARIABLE/INDIFFERENT. cost_regime VARIABLE_STRONGLY_CHEAPER..STABLE_STRONGLY_CHEAPER; grade A-F; flags VARIABLE_CHEAPER_NOW/STABLE_SAFER_TAIL/NEGATIVE_CARRY_AT_P95/HIGH_RATE_VOLATILITY/STABLE_REBALANCE_RISK/NEAR_BREAKEVEN/RISING_VARIABLE_RATE/FALLING_VARIABLE_RATE/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper. Pure stdlib, guarded divisions, atomic tmp+os.replace, ring-buffer 100 (data/borrow_rate_mode_optimizer_log.json). 165 tests green.

done.title: DeFiProtocolSupplyCapProximityAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only: deposit-SIDE Aave-V3-style supplyCap analysis (distinct from debt-ceiling/borrow side). Quantifies headroom before the supply cap is hit, whether an intended deposit fits, time-to-cap, and yield-compression/crowding risk of a near-full cap. Metrics: utilization_of_cap_pct, remaining_headroom_usd, headroom_pct, deposit_fits, fillable_pct_of_deposit, days_until_cap_reached (sentinel DAYS_SENTINEL_NEVER=1e9 when growth<=0), post_deposit_utilization_pct, yield_compression_risk_pct, cap_proximity_score 0-100 (higher=safer). classification AMPLE_HEADROOM/COMFORTABLE/APPROACHING_CAP/NEAR_CAP/AT_CAP + UNCAPPED; grade A-F; flags AT_CAP/NEAR_CAP/DEPOSIT_DOES_NOT_FIT/FAST_FILLING/CAP_REACHED_SOON/AMPLE_HEADROOM/UNCAPPED_MARKET/HIGH_YIELD_COMPRESSION_RISK/SHRINKING_SUPPLY/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper. Pure stdlib, guarded divisions, atomic tmp+os.replace, ring-buffer 100 (data/supply_cap_proximity_log.json). 172 tests green.

Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log. Gap-confirmed (reward_token_lockup=0). 83 tests green.

done.title: DeFiProtocolStablecoinYieldBasisSpreadAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only: decomposes a stablecoin position yield vs a risk-free benchmark to isolate the excess basis (spread over risk-free) being paid and whether it compensates protocol/depeg risk. Computes headline_apy_pct, risk_free_rate_pct, excess_basis_pct, basis_to_risk_ratio (signed sentinel +/-1e9 on zero risk proxy), depeg_expected_cost_pct, real_excess_after_depeg_haircut_pct, risk_compensation_score 0-100. classification NEGATIVE_CARRY/THIN_SPREAD/FAIR/GENEROUS/EXCEPTIONAL, grade A-F, flags (NEGATIVE_EXCESS_BASIS/THIN_COMPENSATION/GENEROUS_CARRY/HIGH_DEPEG_DRAG/BELOW_RISK_FREE/INSUFFICIENT_DATA). analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper, pure stdlib, atomic tempfile+os.replace ring-buffer 100 (data/stablecoin_yield_basis_spread_log.json). Gap-grep basis_spread/benchmark_spread/excess_basis=0. 105 tests green. Sprint v8.08.

done.title: DeFiProtocolYieldAfterTaxDragAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only (not tax advice): computes after-tax realisable APR and tax drag from marginal tax rate, harvest frequency (each harvest=taxable event) and holding term (ST vs LT). Computes headline_apr_pct, marginal_tax_rate_pct, long_term_rate_pct, long_term_income_share, effective_tax_rate_pct (ST/LT blend), after_tax_apr_pct, tax_drag_pct, after_tax_efficiency_score 0-100. classification MINIMAL_DRAG/LIGHT/MODERATE/HEAVY/SEVERE, grade A-F, flags (HIGH_MARGINAL_RATE/FREQUENT_TAXABLE_EVENTS/QUALIFIES_LONG_TERM/SEVERE_TAX_DRAG/NEGATIVE_AFTER_TAX/INSUFFICIENT_DATA). analyze + analyze_portfolio + class wrapper, pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer 100 (data/yield_after_tax_drag_log.json). Gap-grep after_tax/tax_drag=0 (defi_tax_lot_tracker is lot/cost-basis, different angle). 109 tests green. Sprint v8.08.

done.title: DeFiProtocolYieldTermStructureAnalyzer
done.desc: Срочная структура (term structure) доходности по тенорам: детекция инверсии кривой, наклон/term spread, reinvest-adjusted optimal tenor, term_structure_score. Gap: term_structure/curve_inversion=0.

done.title: DeFiProtocolStablecoinPegArbitrageAnalyzer
done.desc: Конвергенс-арбитраж off-peg стейбла: EV дисконта+yield против риска невосстановления пега, breakeven repeg-prob, risk/reward, peg_arb_score. Gap: peg_arbitrage/convergence_arb=0 (отличен от depeg_risk_monitor).

done.title: DeFiProtocolRewardClaimTimingOptimizer
done.desc: Оптимальный момент клейма накопленных reward: фикс. газ клейма против стоимости ожидания (ценовой риск удержания vol*sqrt(t) + упущенный реинвест-доход), порог клейма, дни до порога, рекоменд. частота, net_benefit, claim_timing_score 0-100. classification CLAIM_NOW/CLAIM_SOON/ACCUMULATE/TOO_SMALL_TO_CLAIM. Gap: claim_timing/reward_claim=0 (отличен от gas_cost_breakeven и reward_token_lockup).

done.title: DeFiProtocolTVLYieldElasticityAnalyzer
done.desc: Компрессия APR пула при росте TVL: отделяет разбавляемую incentive-компоненту (fixed_reward_flow/TVL) от sticky base-доходности, моделирует self-crowding собств. депозита и внешний приток, projected_apr, self/external dilution, yield_elasticity, elasticity_score 0-100. classification STICKY_YIELD..SEVERE_COMPRESSION. Gap: tvl_yield_elasticity=0 (отличен от supply_cap_proximity и tvl_momentum).

done.title: DeFiProtocolRiskAdjustedYieldHurdleAnalyzer
done.desc: Проверяет, перекрывает ли offered APR риск-скорректированный hurdle с учётом tail-loss: expected_annual_loss=(prob×lge), risk_adjusted_apr, required_hurdle=risk_free+expected_loss, excess_over_hurdle, risk_premium_coverage_ratio (sentinel 1e9), clears_hurdle, hurdle_clearance_score 0-100. classification GENEROUS_PREMIUM..NEGATIVE_PREMIUM. Gap: risk_adjusted_yield_hurdle=0 (sustainability/real-vs-incentive не считают required risk-premium из явной loss-probability+lge).

done.title: DeFiProtocolFixedVsFloatingYieldDecisionAnalyzer
done.desc: EARN-side решение lock-fixed vs stay-floating: spread fixed vs current/expected floating, breakeven_avg_floating=fixed_apr, fixed/expected total returns, advantage_of_fixed, probability_floating_beats_fixed (Normal/Phi, защита при sd=0), decision_score 0-100 (выше=lock). classification STRONG_LOCK..STRONG_FLOAT + recommendation LOCK_FIXED/STAY_FLOATING/NEUTRAL. Gap: fixed_vs_floating earn-side=0 (borrow-mode optimizer и PT/YT-tokenization про другое).

done.title: DeFiProtocolMEVProtectionEffectivenessAnalyzer
done.desc: MEV-защита: sandwich/frontrun экспозиция, покрытие (private orderflow/commit-reveal/batch auction), protection_score, эффект на net yield.

done.title: DeFiProtocolBorrowerConcentrationRiskAnalyzer
done.desc: Концентрация заёмщиков в lending-пуле: HHI, доля top-borrower, каскад-ликвидации, bad-debt tail.

done.title: DeFiProtocolLendingUtilizationElasticityAnalyzer
done.desc: Чувствительность supply/borrow-ставок к utilization вдоль kink-кривой: близость к kink, cliff-risk, траектории при шоках.

done.title: DeFiProtocolCrossChainYieldBasisRiskAnalyzer
done.desc: Basis-risk одного актива на разных чейнах/протоколах: спред, convergence-risk, bridge/migration-затраты, решение о ребалансе.

done.title: DeFiProtocolStablecoinParRedemptionCapacityAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: способность выйти из стейбла ПО НОМИНАЛУ ($1) в масштабе — пропускная способность primary-редемпшна (дневной cap, очередь/cooldown, ликвидное обеспечение) + secondary-глубина. Метрики days_to_par_exit, backing_coverage_ratio, capacity_utilization, net_par_proceeds, маршрут PRIMARY/SECONDARY/SPLIT/TRAPPED, capacity_score 0-100. Отличие от depeg-мониторов (цена) и reserve_quality (состав).

done.title: DeFiProtocolEmergencyWithdrawalPauseRiskAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: риск ЗАМОРОЗКИ вывода (fund-trapping) — pausable-путь, тип контроллера (EOA/MULTISIG/TIMELOCK/DAO + m-of-n), worst_case_locked_days, годовая prob паузы, emergency-exit bypass, opportunity_cost трапнутого капитала, trap_risk_score/safety_score 0-100. Отличие от admin_key_control (широта власти) — изолирует withdrawal-trap метрики.

done.title: DeFiProtocolMinimumProfitablePositionSizeAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: минимальный размер позиции (USD), при котором net-yield за горизонт покрывает round-trip gas (entry+exit) + opportunity-cost hurdle. Метрики: roundtrip_gas, min_profitable_position, entry_breakeven_days, gas_as_pct_of_position, yield_per_gas_ratio, net_excess, capital_efficiency_score. classification HIGHLY_PROFITABLE/PROFITABLE/MARGINAL/DUST/UNPROFITABLE; recommendation DEPLOY/DEPLOY_LARGER/SKIP. Закрывает gap: minimum_profitable_position/gas_amortization/entry_breakeven_days/yield_per_gas/dust_threshold = 0.

done.title: DeFiProtocolAutoCompoundKeeperReliabilityAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: надёжность keeper/harvest авто-компаундинга и drag realized-vs-theoretical APY. Метрики: harvest_staleness_ratio, harvest_completion_rate, missed_harvest_rate, apy_drag/apy_realization, keeper_centralization, reliability_score. classification HIGHLY_RELIABLE/RELIABLE/DEGRADED/UNRELIABLE/STALLED. Закрывает gap: autocompound_keeper/keeper_reliability/harvest_staleness/vault_share_price_growth = 0.

done.title: DeFiProtocolPerformanceFeeHighWaterMarkAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: механика high-water mark (HWM) у performance-fee волта. После просадки perf fee НЕ берётся пока NAV не превысит прежний HWM, но mgmt fee капает в подводный период. Метрики: underwater_pct, recovery_to_hwm_pct, gross_above_hwm_pct, mgmt_fee_drag, perf_fee_drag_with_hwm vs no_hwm, hwm_savings_pct, net_apy_pct, fee_efficiency_score. classification LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/EXCESSIVE_FEE_DRAG. Закрывает gap: high_water_mark/hwm=0.

done.title: DeFiProtocolPerformanceFeeCrystallizationFrequencyAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: как часто perf fee кристаллизуется и какой доп. drag от упущенного компаундинга. Метрики: crystallization_label (CONTINUOUS..INFREQUENT), crystallizations_over_horizon, nominal/effective_perf_fee_drag, compounding_loss_pct, pay_for_volatility_risk_pct, net_apy_pct, frequency_efficiency_score. classification INVESTOR_FRIENDLY/NEUTRAL/INVESTOR_UNFRIENDLY/PREDATORY. Закрывает gap: crystallization=0.

done.title: DeFiProtocolDepositCapHeadroomAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: близость волта к deposit cap и headroom/dilution-риск входа. cap_utilization, remaining_headroom, intended_fits, days_to_cap_at_current_inflow, projected_dilution, headroom_score; AMPLE/MODERATE/TIGHT_HEADROOM/CAP_REACHED. Закрывает gap deposit_cap=0. Tier-B vault_capacity.

done.title: DeFiProtocolDepositorConcentrationAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: концентрация депозиторов (доминирование китов) → bank-run/exit риск. top1/top5_share, effective_depositor_count, whale_exit_tvl_drop, HHI, concentration_score (выше=безопаснее); WELL_DISTRIBUTED/MODERATELY/HIGHLY_CONCENTRATED/WHALE_DOMINATED. Закрывает gap depositor_concentration=0. Tier-B vault_capacity.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultShareInflationAttackExposureAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: подверженность ERC-4626 волта атаке share-inflation / first-depositor donation (крошечный share supply + нет virtual-shares/decimals-offset/dead-shares → депозиты округляются в 0 шар). Метрики: share_price_usd, effective_protection, donation_to_inflate_usd, rounding_loss_shares_pct, vulnerability_score (выше=безопаснее); WELL_PROTECTED/LOW/MODERATE/HIGH_RISK. Новая категория vault_safety. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultIdleCashDragAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: доля idle/незадействованного капитала волта и APY-drag от него (idle не приносит дохода → realized APY < strategy APY). Метрики: idle_pct/deployed_pct, effective_apr_pct, apr_drag_pct, excess_idle_pct, recoverable_apr_pct, efficiency_score (выше=лучше); FULLY_DEPLOYED/LEAN/HEAVY_BUFFER/MOSTLY_IDLE. Новая категория capital_efficiency. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPendingHarvestPremiumAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: премия незахарвестенных наград. Накопленные но не захарвестенные награды волта ещё не отражены в share price → при харвесте цена шара ступенчато растёт. Метрики: pending_premium_pct, net_premium_pct (после perf-fee), harvest_progress_pct, hours_to_next_harvest, timing_edge_pct, score (выше=лучше окно входа); CLEAN/MINOR/MODERATE/LARGE_PREMIUM. Новая категория vault_timing. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultRoundTripCostAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: round-trip стоимость ротации капитала в волт (deposit_fee + withdrawal_fee + entry/exit slippage) vs APR-преимущество за период удержания. Метрики: round_trip_cost_pct, breakeven_days (None=никогда), net_gain_pct@horizon, covers_horizon, score (выше=дешевле/быстрее окупается); CHEAP/FAIR/EXPENSIVE/PROHIBITIVE/NEVER_BREAKS_EVEN. Новая категория cost_efficiency. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultStrategyMigrationRiskAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: риск окна миграции стратегии волта (свап underlying strategy-контракта за тем же share-токеном). Метрики: maturity нового strategy-контракта, migrated_tvl_pct, governance_protected (timelock>=24h), days_since_migration/settledness, share_price_continuity, migration_count_90d (churn); score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=безопаснее; classification LOW/MODERATE/ELEVATED/HIGH_MIGRATION_RISK. Категория vault_safety. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultWithdrawalFeeDecayAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: время-затухающая early-withdrawal (loyalty) комиссия волта. Метрики: current_fee_pct на текущий days_held (линейный decay initial→floor за fee_decay_days), days_to_floor, fee_savings_if_wait, yield_while_waiting, at_floor; score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=дешевле выйти сейчас; classification MATURED/LOW/MODERATE/HIGH_EXIT_FEE. Категория cost_efficiency. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultRewardLockDiscountAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: волт платит часть APR в ЗАЛОЧЕННОМ/вестящемся reward-токене (esTOKEN-style) — залоченная доля стоит меньше face value (present-value haircut за lock_days + early_unlock_penalty + already_vested). Метрики: pv_factor=1/(1+r)^(lock_days/365), discounted_reward_apr, liquid_equivalent_apr, apr_haircut_pct/share, locked_share_pct, penalty_cost_apr; score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=больше yield ликвидно/durable; classification MOSTLY_LIQUID/MODERATE_LOCK/HEAVY_LOCK/FULLY_LOCKED. Отличие от token_vesting_overhang (рыночное давление разлока) и reward_emission_decay (затухание эмиссии) — изолирует PV-haircut залоченной доли APR самого волта. Категория yield_quality. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultInstantExitNavDiscountAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: выбор между INSTANT exit с дисконтом к NAV (haircut за немедленность) и queued redemption по полному NAV после ожидания. Метрики: instant_exit_discount_pct (из nav/price или прямой), instant_exit_cost_usd, excess_apr (redeploy_apr-vault_apr), wait_opportunity_cost_pct, breakeven_wait_days (None если excess<=0), instant_cheaper, savings_by_waiting; score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=меньше exit-фрикции; classification MINIMAL/LOW/MODERATE/STEEP_DISCOUNT; recommendation EXIT_OK/EXIT_INSTANT/WAIT_FOR_NAV. Категория exit_liquidity. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог. Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultGasBreakevenAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: фиксированные газовые издержки волта (round-trip deposit+withdrawal + per-compound) не зависят от размера позиции и съедают доходность маленьких позиций. Для данного position_usd/apr_pct/holding_days считает gas_drag_pct, net_apr_pct (после annualized drag), breakeven_position_usd (=total_gas/(apr/100*years), None если apr≤0 или horizon≤0), breakeven_days (=fixed_gas/(дневной yield), None если знаменатель≤0), net_yield_usd, covers_horizon, compound_gas_share_pct; score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=меньше газ-драг/быстрее окупается (low-drag~50 + positive-net~30 + cheap-fixed~20); classification NEGLIGIBLE/LOW/MODERATE/HIGH_GAS/NEVER_BREAKS_EVEN (+ INSUFFICIENT_DATA fast-path position≤0 и apr≤0); recommendation DEPLOY/DEPLOY_IF_LONG_HOLD/RECONSIDER_SIZE/AVOID; флаги SMALL_POSITION_GAS_HEAVY, COVERS_HORIZON, NEVER_BREAKS_EVEN, HIGH_COMPOUND_GAS, FREE_ENTRY_EXIT, NEGATIVE_NET, INSUFFICIENT_DATA. Категория cost_efficiency. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог (data/vault_gas_breakeven_log.json). Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultDepegRecoveryAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: волт держит привязанный актив (стейбл/LST/LRT), отклонившийся от пега — держателю нужно взвесить текущий дисконт-к-пегу против исторического профиля восстановления (ждать recovery или выходить сейчас, фиксируя убыток). Метрики: depeg_pct (допускает премию<0), discount_to_peg_pct (=max(0,depeg)), recovery_rate_pct (=recoveries/depegs, clamp 0..100), upside_if_recovers_pct (=(peg/price-1)*100), is_stale_depeg (≥30d), undercollateralized; score 0-100 ВЫШЕ=безопаснее/выше шанс восстановления (shallow~35 + recovery-history~25 + fresh~15 + collateralized~15 + redemption~10); classification AT_PEG/MINOR/MODERATE/SEVERE_DEPEG (+ INSUFFICIENT_DATA fast-path current_price≤0 или peg≤0); recommendation HOLD/HOLD_FOR_RECOVERY/EXIT_PARTIAL/EXIT (с учётом recovery history); флаги AT_PEG, FRESH_DEPEG (<7d), STALE_DEPEG (≥30d), STRONG_RECOVERY_HISTORY (≥70%), WEAK_RECOVERY_HISTORY (<30% при истории), COLLATERALIZED, UNDERCOLLATERALIZED, REDEMPTION_AVAILABLE, SEVERE_DISCOUNT (≥10%), INSUFFICIENT_DATA. Категория peg_stability. Чистый stdlib, atomic ring-buffer лог (data/vault_depeg_recovery_log.json). Tier-B.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultCapacityDilutionAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: у стратегии волта конечная ёмкость альфы; когда TVL растёт выше optimal_capacity, маржинальный капитал нельзя разместить под тот же APR и доходность на долю размывается (плюс свой депозит толкает TVL за порог). Метрики: post_deposit_tvl_usd, over_capacity_usd, utilization_pct, effective_apr_pct (=headline*(capacity/post_tvl)**decay_exp за порогом), dilution_pct, apr_lost_pct, headroom_usd/pct; score выше=больше headroom/меньше разводнения; classification AMPLE_HEADROOM/APPROACHING_CAPACITY/OVER_CAPACITY/SEVERELY_DILUTED; recommendation DEPLOY/DEPLOY_SOON/DEPLOY_REDUCED_SIZE/AVOID. Чистый stdlib, ring-buffer 100. registry Tier-B (yield_quality).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultHarvestTimingAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: у волта копятся pending-награды, реинвестируемые только при harvest/compound; сбор стоит фикс. газ. Слишком часто — газ съедает награду, слишком редко — теряешь compounding. Метрики: gas_to_reward_ratio, reward_to_gas_ratio, harvest_worthwhile_now, optimal_harvest_pending_usd (=gas*min_ratio), days_to_optimal, optimal_interval_days, net_if_harvest_now_usd, gas_drag_pct, overdue; score выше=ближе к оптимуму/ниже gas-drag; classification HARVEST_NOW/APPROACHING_OPTIMAL/TOO_EARLY/GAS_EXCEEDS_REWARD; recommendation HARVEST_NOW/WAIT_SHORT/WAIT/DO_NOT_HARVEST_YET. Чистый stdlib, ring-buffer 100. registry Tier-B (cost_efficiency).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultSharePriceDrawdownAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: цена доли волта (NAV-per-share) ушла ниже своего исторического high-water-mark; холдер выбирает держать-до-восстановления или выходить. Метрики: drawdown_pct (глубина от HWM), recovery_needed_pct (рост до возврата HWM), underwater_vs_entry_pct, position_underwater, is_stale_drawdown (>=30 дней), recovering/deepening (тренд от цены N дней назад), trend_pct; score выше=мельче просадка/ближе к восстановлению/восстанавливается; classification AT_HIGH/SHALLOW_DRAWDOWN/MODERATE_DRAWDOWN/DEEP_DRAWDOWN; recommendation HOLD/HOLD_FOR_RECOVERY/EXIT (смягчается на ступень при recovering). Отличие от vault_depeg_recovery (про пеггинг) и generic drawdown_recovery_tracker (портфельный) — здесь per-vault share price против собственного HWM. Чистый stdlib, ring-buffer 100. registry Tier-B (performance).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultYieldRealizationGapAnalyzer
done.desc: Advisory/read-only: разрыв между ЗАЯВЛЕННЫМ (headline) APR и РЕАЛИЗОВАННЫМ APR, выведенным из фактического роста цены доли за трейлинг-окно. Устойчивый разрыв = headline завышает реальную доходность (fee drag, idle cash, пропущенные компаунды, затухание эмиссий). Модуль НЕ моделирует конкретную причину — агрегатно меряет realized-vs-promised как сигнал доверия/качества. Метрики: realized_apr_pct (override или annualized из start/end цен за window_days), period_return_pct, gap_pct (=headline-realized), realization_ratio/realization_pct, overstated, meets_headline; score выше=realized ближе/выше headline; classification OUTPERFORMS/MEETS_HEADLINE/MINOR_GAP/MODERATE_GAP/SEVERE_GAP; recommendation TRUST_HEADLINE/DISCOUNT_HEADLINE_SLIGHTLY/DISCOUNT_HEADLINE/AVOID_OR_VERIFY. Чистый stdlib, ring-buffer 100. registry Tier-B (yield_quality).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultFundingRateCarryPersistenceAnalyzer
done.description: Delta-neutral/basis-trade vault headline-honesty: funding carry is SIGNED and mean-reverts/flips negative; measures persistence of positive-funding regime and overstatement of headline (current funding annualised) vs blended realized carry.

Vault headline-honesty: headline APR is the ARITHMETIC mean of per-period yields annualised, but a compounding holder realises the GEOMETRIC mean (AM-GM/Jensen). Measures the VARIANCE DRAG (geometric-vs-arithmetic shortfall) a volatile yield stream eats even with zero fees/full uptime; drag fraction scale-free in annualisation.
done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultYieldVarianceDragRealizationAnalyzer
DeFiProtocolVaultRangeUptimeFeeRealizationAnalyzer
done.description: CLMM vault headline-honesty: a concentrated-liquidity LP vault advertises a fee APR assuming the position is IN-RANGE 100% of the time, but it only earns fees while price sits inside its tick band; out-of-range intervals earn ZERO fees. Realised fee APR = headline * time_in_range_fraction. Measures fee-uptime drag from observed range-status samples (or a direct uptime override), plus out-of-range streaks and in/out churn. HIGHER score = high in-range uptime (realised ~ headline). Distinct from deployment_ramp_drag (one-time entry warm-up vs recurring band-driven inactivity), yield_variance_drag (binary zero-fee availability vs second-moment dispersion), concentrated_liquidity range_optimizer (descriptive honesty vs prescriptive band choice), impermanent_loss_* (fee-income shortfall vs value/divergence loss). Pure stdlib, advisory/read-only, atomic ring-buffer log.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPriceReturnContaminationAnalyzer
done.description: Vault trailing-APY honesty decomposition: a vault's headline 'APY' is computed from share-price/NAV growth, which mixes recurring yield (fees/interest/emissions — persistent, repeatable) with the price return of the underlying volatile token (a one-time, mean-reverting mark-to-market move that is NOT repeatable). Realised recurring yield = total_return - price_return per period, annualised; the price-return contribution inflates the headline. Classifies PURE_YIELD..LIGHTLY/MODERATELY_CONTAMINATED..PRICE_DRIVEN by the scale-free contamination fraction (price share of |headline|); flags PRICE_RALLY_INFLATED, RECURRING_YIELD_NEGATIVE, MEAN_REVERSION_EXPOSED, HEADLINE_FROM_APPRECIATION. HIGHER score = headline almost all recurring yield (forward-realisable). Distinct from reward_token_price_exposure (forward price-risk vs backward decomposition), headline_spot_vs_twap (rate-level representativeness vs non-repeatable capital gain), yield_variance_drag (second-moment geom<arith vs first-moment price subtraction), share_price_premium (price-over-NAV vs composition of NAV growth). Advisory/read-only Tier-B, pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultHarvestYieldConcentrationAnalyzer
done.description: Vault headline-APR repeatability/run-rate honesty: a vault's headline trailing APR annualises the SUM of yield collected over a window, but that total is often dominated by a few non-repeatable harvest lumps (one-off airdrop, single fat bribe epoch, liquidation windfall). Measures TEMPORAL concentration of per-harvest yield contributions (HHI, Herfindahl-normalised concentration_index, effective_harvests, top/top3 event share, Gini, windfall_count/share, CV) and estimates a deconcentrated repeatable run-rate by anchoring on the TYPICAL (median) harvest: realization_ratio=clamp(median*n/sum,0,1), recurring_apr=headline*realization_ratio, overstatement=headline-recurring. classification DIVERSE_RECURRING/MILDLY_LUMPY/CONCENTRATED/WINDFALL_DOMINATED on concentration_index (+INSUFFICIENT_DATA); flags SINGLE_EVENT_DOMINATED/WINDFALL_PRESENT/HIGH_DISPERSION/FEW_HARVESTS/SMOOTH_RECURRING/RUN_RATE_FROM_OVERRIDE; score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*(1-concentration_index),0,100). Optional recurring_apr_pct override when <2 harvest samples. Distinct from yield_variance_drag (second-moment compounding penalty), relative_yield_outlier (cross-peer), yield_source_concentration_risk/strategy_diversification (concentration across SOURCES not TIME), harvest_cycle_entry_timing/pending_harvest_premium (capture timing), price_return_contamination (price vs yield decomposition). Pure stdlib, advisory/read-only, atomic ring-buffer log, no inf/NaN. Registry Tier-B weight 0.5.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultLeveragedCarrySpreadCompressionAnalyzer
done.description: Leveraged/looping vault net-carry honesty: a leveraged or looping vault advertises a headline NET APR (net_headline = base_yield*L - borrow_snapshot*(L-1)) struck at a favourable SNAPSHOT borrow rate, but the borrow rate is variable and rises with utilisation; over a holding window the realised borrow cost (mean of trailing samples) compresses the net carry, with the borrow move AMPLIFIED by (L-1). Realised net = base_yield*L - borrow_realized*(L-1); if borrow_realized reaches base_yield the levered carry inverts negative. Classifies STABLE_SPREAD/MILD/HEAVY/SEVERE_COMPRESSION by scale-free compression_fraction (+carry_inverted). Distinct from leverage_adjusted_apy_calculator (prescriptive calc), leverage_loop_risk_analyzer (liquidation risk), funding_rate_carry_persistence (perp funding sign), stablecoin_yield_basis_spread (venue basis) and yield_variance_drag (second-moment). Pure stdlib, read-only/advisory, atomic ring-buffer, finite sentinels. Registry Tier-B yield_quality w=0.5.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultDollarWeightedReturnGapAnalyzer
done.description: Vault TWR-vs-DWR behavior-gap honesty: a vault advertises a headline trailing APY that is a TIME-WEIGHTED return (flow-timing independent), but the average depositor realises the DOLLAR-WEIGHTED (money-weighted) return, which capital-weights each period's return. When large inflows chase a hot streak that mean-reverts (or capital leaves before high-return periods), the realised dollar-weighted return diverges below the headline TWR — the classic investor-return/behavior gap applied to a DeFi vault. Module simulates the balance path, computes DWR vs TWR, behavior_gap = twr - dwr, and a scale-free gap_fraction → ALIGNED/MILD/MODERATE/SEVERE_GAP. Pure stdlib, read-only/advisory, atomic ring-buffer log.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeVolatilityTaxAnalyzer
done.description: Vault performance-fee volatility-tax (fee asymmetry drag): a vault charges a performance fee on gains over a high-water mark but does NOT rebate it on drawdowns, so a volatile gross-return path realises a LOWER net-of-perf-fee return than a smooth path with the same gross APR. Headline net APR assumes the smooth path. Simulates the HWM net-NAV path applying perf fee only on up-periods over HWM; volatility_tax_pct = smooth_net_apr - realised_net_apr; fee_drag_total_pct = gross_apr - realised_net_apr; realisation_ratio = realised_net/smooth_net. Higher score = realised_net approx smooth_net (low vol / neutral asymmetry). Lower score = large volatility tax. Advisory/read-only, pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log. Distinct from performance_fee_high_water_mark (snapshot above/below HWM), performance_fee_crystallization_frequency (fee timing), vault_yield_variance_drag (geom-vs-arith on gross, no fee), vault_management_fee_accrual (linear mgmt fee).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultNetOfLossYieldRealizationAnalyzer
done.description: Vault net-of-loss yield realization: a vault advertises a headline yield APY computed ONLY from the positive income stream (harvest rewards, trading fees, interest), annualised, but the depositor true realised return must NET that headline against a SEPARATE omitted stream of loss epochs (realised IL, slashing, bad-debt socialisation, negative trading epochs) that hit NAV directly and are not folded into the headline. headline_yield_apr = mean(yield_samples)*ppy; loss_drag_apr = mean(loss_magnitudes)*ppy (0 if none); net_realized_apr = headline - loss_drag; overstatement_pct = headline - net (= loss_drag); realization_ratio = clamp(net/headline,0,1); loss_fraction = clamp(loss_drag/headline,0,1) is the scale-free classification basis. e.g. 24% headline minus ~9% realised IL/bad-debt = ~15% net-of-loss realised APR; discount the headline to the downside-inclusive return. Higher score = losses negligible (realised approx headline). Lower score = large omitted loss stream or net-negative. Override path (headline_yield_apr_pct + loss_drag_apr_pct). Advisory/read-only, pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log, sentinels (no inf/NaN). Distinct from share_price_drawdown (single drawdown event magnitude/recovery), loss_socialization_exposure (forward bad-debt risk), yield_variance_drag (second-moment dispersion of one series, zeroes here when loss stream empty even if yield volatile), dollar_weighted_return_gap (cashflow timing), price_return_contamination (split positive NAV growth), real_yield_vs_incentive_yield (split positive yield, both positive), performance_fee_volatility_tax (fee asymmetry, not investment losses).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultEntryExitFeeAmortizationAnalyzer
done.description: Vault advertises a headline RUNNING APR excluding one-off entry/exit fees; amortised over the holding horizon those round-trip fees are an annualised drag (shorter hold = larger drag). Nets the amortised fee out to the realised APR; breakeven_days. Reconciled into done column (was shipped v8.51 but missing from done).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultHeadlineYieldHonestyCompositeAnalyzer
done.description: Composite BOTTOM-UP roll-up of the per-mechanism headline-drag family (fee amortisation, management fee, perf-fee vol tax, net-of-loss, dollar-weighted gap, autosell slippage, idle/ramp, emission decay, ...) into ONE net realised APR, total overstatement, single honesty score and the DOMINANT culprit. Sums component annualised drags (list/dict/bare-number inputs; alt keys; negatives→magnitude), net=headline-Σdrag, drag_fraction classification CLEAN/MILD/MODERATE/SEVERE (+net-negative), override total_drag path, flags SINGLE_DOMINANT_DRAG/MANY_DRAG_SOURCES. Distinct from yield_realization_gap (MP-1169: top-down EMPIRICAL share-price gap, cause-agnostic) — here additive attribution naming the culprit.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeHurdleRateGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only: волт берёт perf fee без hurdle (или ниже benchmark) → депозитор платит комиссию на БЕТУ как на альфу. Метрики: fee_charged/fair_fee/excess_fee_apr, hurdle_gap, gross/net_alpha_apr, alpha_realization_ratio, fee_on_beta_fraction. Классы CLEAN_HURDLE/MILD/MODERATE/SEVERE_BETA_TAX/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. Tier-B yield_quality w0.5.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeUnrealizedGainClawbackGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault crystallizes a PERFORMANCE fee on UNREALIZED (paper) peak gains but offers NO clawback when those gains later reverse — depositor paid a fee on profit that evaporated, so net realized return is overstated by the fee charged on the un-recovered (reverted) portion. fee_frac=clamp(fee/100); reverted_gain=max(0,peak-realized); fee_paid_on_peak=fee_frac*max(0,peak); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,realized); clawback_gap=max(0,fee_paid_on_peak-fair_fee); net_realized=realized-fee_paid_on_peak; overstatement=clawback_gap; fee_on_reverted_fraction=clamp(clawback_gap/fee_paid_on_peak,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio with net_fair<=0 edge mirroring hurdle-template. override path: direct clawback_gap_pct verbatim (+positive peak & fee_paid_on_peak), geometry None, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. classification by fee_on_reverted_fraction: CLEAN_PERSISTENT_GAIN(<=0.05)/MILD_CLAWBACK_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_CLAWBACK_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_CLAWBACK_GAP(>0.50 or net<0)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. flags CLEAN_NO_REVERSAL/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_VANISHED_GAINS/FULL_REVERSAL/MULTIPLE_CRYSTALLIZATIONS/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*(1-fee_on_reverted_fraction),0,100). recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_CLAWBACK_GAP/DEMAND_CLAWBACK_PROVISION/AVOID_NO_CLAWBACK; grade A-F; aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_clawback_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_unrealized_gain_clawback_gap_log.json cap 100), no inf/NaN. Distinct from perf-fee HWM / volatility-tax / crystallization-frequency / hurdle-rate-gap and real-vs-paper-yield: novel axis = fee on unrealized peak gains that later reversed without clawback.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeSubscriptionTimingEqualizationGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault crystallizes a PERFORMANCE fee on the FULL-PERIOD NAV gain, but a depositor who SUBSCRIBED MID-PERIOD only earned the gain accrued AFTER his entry. Without equalization (series accounting / equalization credits) the mid-period subscriber pays a fee on pre-entry gains he never earned. fee_frac=clamp(fee/100); pre_entry_gain=max(0,full-post_entry); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,full); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,post_entry); equalization_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair_fee); net_after_fee=post_entry-fee_charged; net_fair=post_entry-fair_fee; overstatement=equalization_gap; net_is_negative=net_fair<0; fee_on_pre_entry_fraction=clamp(equalization_gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio with net_fair<=0 edge mirroring hurdle/clawback-template. override path: direct equalization_gap_pct verbatim (+positive full & fee_charged), geometry None, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE, realization_ratio anchored to (1-fee_on_pre_entry_fraction). classification by fee_on_pre_entry_fraction: CLEAN_FULLY_EQUALIZED(<=0.05)/MILD_EQUALIZATION_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_EQUALIZATION_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_EQUALIZATION_GAP(>0.50 or net_is_negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. flags CLEAN_FULL_EQUALIZATION/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_PRE_ENTRY_GAINS/FULL_PRE_ENTRY/LATE_SUBSCRIPTION(entry_fraction>=0.5)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*(1-fee_on_pre_entry_fraction),0,100). recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_EQUALIZATION_GAP/DEMAND_EQUALIZATION_ACCOUNTING/AVOID_NO_EQUALIZATION; grade A-F; aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_equalization_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_subscription_timing_equalization_gap_log.json cap 100), no inf/NaN. Distinct from perf-fee HWM / volatility-tax / crystallization-frequency / hurdle-rate-gap / unrealized-clawback / cross-sleeve-netting: novel axis = fee on full-period gain for a mid-period subscriber with no equalization (pre-entry gains never earned).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeManagementFeeBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS return, BEFORE the management (AUM) fee is deducted, so the depositor pays a perf fee on the slice of return the management fee already consumed — a FEE-ON-FEE; the fair base would be the return NET OF the management fee. fee_frac=clamp(fee/100); mgmt_consumed=max(0,gross_return-net_of_mgmt_return); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,gross_return); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,net_of_mgmt_return); fee_on_fee_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair_fee) (perf fee on the management-fee layer); net_after_fee=net_of_mgmt_return-fee_charged; net_fair=net_of_mgmt_return-fair_fee; overstatement=fee_on_fee_gap; net_is_negative=net_fair<0; fee_on_mgmt_fraction=clamp(fee_on_fee_gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio with net_fair<=0 edge mirroring hurdle/clawback/equalization template. inputs: gross_return_pct (REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA), net_of_mgmt_return_pct (signed, may be <gross or <0, default 0 = mgmt fee consumed everything), performance_fee_pct (coerced 0..100), optional management_fee_pct (informational, HIGH_MGMT_FEE flag >=2.0). override path: direct fee_on_fee_gap_pct verbatim (+positive gross & fee_charged), geometry None, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE, realization_ratio anchored to (1-fee_on_mgmt_fraction). classification by fee_on_mgmt_fraction: CLEAN_NET_OF_MGMT_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD_FEE_ON_FEE_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_FEE_ON_FEE_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_FEE_ON_FEE_GAP(>0.50 or net_is_negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA. flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_MGMT_LAYER/FULL_FEE_ON_FEE/HIGH_MGMT_FEE/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*(1-fee_on_mgmt_fraction),0,100). recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_FEE_ON_FEE/DEMAND_NET_OF_MGMT_BASE/AVOID_FEE_ON_FEE; grade A-F; aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_fee_on_fee_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_management_fee_base_gap_log.json cap 100), no inf/NaN. Distinct from the 7 perf-fee modules (HWM-reset / volatility-tax / crystallization-frequency / hurdle-rate-gap / unrealized-clawback / cross-sleeve-netting / subscription-timing-equalization) and the 2 management-fee modules (management_fee_accrual = the continuous AUM-fee drag itself; management_fee_on_idle_capital = mgmt fee on uninvested cash): novel axis = the INTERACTION where the PERFORMANCE-fee BASE is gross-of-management-fee rather than net-of-management-fee (fee-on-fee / fee-stacking).

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeCatchUpClauseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault advertises a HURDLE rate, but under a SOFT hurdle with a CATCH-UP clause the manager, once gross > hurdle, takes a catch-up share of the band above the hurdle until having received fee_frac of the ENTIRE gross — clawing back the hurdle exemption. fair_fee=fee_frac*excess(hard hurdle); fee_charged=catch-up fee (up to fee_frac*gross at full catch-up); catchup_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair); hurdle_value=fee_frac*min(hurdle,gross); scale-free catchup_recoup_fraction=clamp(gap/hurdle_value,0,1) drives classification CLEAN_HARD_HURDLE/MILD/MODERATE/SEVERE_CATCHUP_GAP. Score=70*realization_ratio+30*(1-recoup). Override path (gap+fee_charged), partial vs full catch-up math (x_full=fee_frac*hurdle/(catch_up_rate-fee_frac)). Distinct from hurdle_rate_gap (fee on beta vs alpha) and 7 other perf-fee modules. Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer, 85 tests green.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeGrossOfCostBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS harvested profit BEFORE deducting the gas/keeper/harvest costs the vault pays to realize it; the FAIR base is the profit NET OF those costs (the depositor only keeps net-of-cost profit). fee_frac=clamp(perf_fee/100); gross_profit_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; net_of_cost_profit_pct (default 0, may be<gross, may be negative); cost_consumed_profit_pct=max(0,gross-net); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,gross) (reality); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,net) (belief); fee_on_cost_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair_fee); fee_on_cost_fraction=clamp(gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; net_return_after_fee/net_return_fair; realization_ratio with non-positive-fair edge. classification CLEAN_NET_OF_COST_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD/MODERATE(<=0.50)/SEVERE(>0.50 or net_negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realization+30*(1-fee_on_cost_fraction)); flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_HARVEST_COST/FULL_FEE_ON_COST/HIGH_HARVEST_COST(>=5%)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE; override path takes fee_on_cost_gap_pct+fee_charged_pct verbatim. Distinct from management_fee_base_gap (adds back the MANAGEMENT/AUM fee, not gas/harvest cost) and from the gas-drag/gas-breakeven modules (which price gas drag on yield, not the performance-fee BASE). Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_gross_of_cost_base_gap_log.json, cap 100), no inf/NaN. registry Tier-B yield_quality weight 0.5 (B 464->465, ALL 657->658). Self-authored: no type=code&status=ready task in KANBAN (backlog=26: agent_infra needing git/launchd/keychain on Mac + USER ACTION; features=7 P3; ideas=3 LOW); orchestrator chose a non-overlapping axis after a catalog grep scan. done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeProtocolRevenueShareBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault's strategy deposits into an UNDERLYING DeFi protocol that takes a revenue-share/take-rate cut of the yield BEFORE it reaches the depositor; the vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS yield (before the protocol's revenue-share cut), not on the NET-OF-PROTOCOL-SHARE yield the depositor receives, so the depositor pays a perf fee on the slice the external protocol already took. fee_frac=clamp(perf_fee/100); gross_yield_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; net_of_protocol_share_yield_pct (default 0, may be<gross, may be negative); protocol_consumed_yield_pct=max(0,gross-net); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,gross); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,net); fee_on_protocol_share_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair); fee_on_protocol_share_fraction=clamp(gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; net_return_after_fee/net_return_fair; realization_ratio with non-positive-fair edge. classification CLEAN_NET_OF_PROTOCOL_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD/MODERATE(<=0.50)/SEVERE(>0.50 or net_negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realization+30*(1-fee_on_protocol_share_fraction)); flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_PROTOCOL_SHARE/FULL_FEE_ON_PROTOCOL_SHARE/HIGH_PROTOCOL_TAKE(>=20%)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE; override path takes fee_on_protocol_share_gap_pct+fee_charged_pct verbatim (geometry None, geometry-only flags suppressed). DISTINCT THIRD/EXTERNAL cost layer: gross_of_cost_base_gap=gas/keeper/HARVEST costs the VAULT pays a keeper; management_fee_base_gap=the vault's OWN management/AUM fee (fee-on-fee); HERE=the underlying PROTOCOL's revenue-share/take-rate cut. Also distinct from protocol_revenue_share_analyzer (prices a protocol's revenue DISTRIBUTION generally; HERE prices the perf-fee BASE inflation from charging gross-of-revenue-share). Distinct from the other 7 perf-fee modules (HWM/volatility/crystallization/hurdle/catch-up) and gas-drag modules. Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_protocol_revenue_share_base_gap_log.json, cap 100), no inf/NaN. registry Tier-B yield_quality weight 0.5 (B 465->466, ALL 657->658). Self-authored: no type=code&status=ready task in KANBAN; orchestrator chose a non-overlapping axis after a catalog grep scan (no perf-fee x revenue-share base-gap module existed). STRICTLY READ-ONLY (SPA-BL-011): risk/execution/monitoring/allocator/cycle_runner.py/golive_checker.py untouched. 91 tests green.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeGrossOfReserveContributionBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault diverts a portion of its yield into an INTERNAL insurance/safety/reserve buffer fund (a backstop the depositor does NOT receive as spendable yield this period, and may never if the buffer absorbs future losses); the vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS yield (BEFORE the reserve-contribution diversion), not on the NET-OF-RESERVE yield the depositor receives, so the depositor pays a perf fee on the reserve-fund slice they never received. fee_frac=clamp(perf_fee/100); gross_yield_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; net_of_reserve_yield_pct (default 0, may be<gross, may be negative); reserve_consumed_yield_pct=max(0,gross-net); fee_charged=fee_frac*max(0,gross); fair_fee=fee_frac*max(0,net); fee_on_reserve_gap=max(0,fee_charged-fair); fee_on_reserve_fraction=clamp(gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; net_return_after_fee/net_return_fair; realization_ratio with non-positive-fair edge. classification CLEAN_NET_OF_RESERVE_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD/MODERATE(<=0.50)/SEVERE(>0.50 or net_negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realization+30*(1-fee_on_reserve_fraction)); flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_RESERVE_CONTRIBUTION/FULL_FEE_ON_RESERVE/HIGH_RESERVE_DIVERSION(>=20%)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE; override path takes fee_on_reserve_gap_pct+fee_charged_pct verbatim (geometry None, geometry-only flags suppressed). DISTINCT INTERNAL layer: protocol_revenue_share_base_gap=EXTERNAL underlying protocol's take-rate; gross_of_cost_base_gap=gas/keeper/HARVEST costs the vault PAYS a keeper; management_fee_base_gap=the vault's OWN management/AUM fee (fee-on-fee); HERE=the vault's INTERNAL reserve/insurance-buffer yield diversion. Also distinct from defi_insurance_*/insurance_fund_adequacy modules (assess COVERAGE/ADEQUACY; HERE prices the perf-fee BASE being gross-of-reserve-contribution). Distinct from the other 7 perf-fee modules (HWM/volatility/crystallization/hurdle/catch-up). Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_gross_of_reserve_contribution_base_gap_log.json, cap 100), no inf/NaN. registry Tier-B yield_quality weight 0.5 (B 466->467, ALL 658->659).
