done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultEarlyExitYieldForfeitureAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault accrues yield continuously but only CRYSTALLIZES it (makes it withdrawable) at discrete points / after a cooldown/lock/vesting window; the slice accrued since the last crystallization but not yet vested is PENDING yield. If capital exits BEFORE the pending slice vests, that slice is FORFEITED (retained by remaining LPs) — a realized-APY drag on early rotation (relevant to SPA's tournament/promotion capital rotation). total_accrued_yield_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; pending_yield_pct (default 0, clamped [0,total]); vesting_progress_pct 0..100 (applied only in LINEAR mode); forfeit_mode CLIFF(default: whole pending forfeited until crystallization)/LINEAR(pro-rata: forfeited=pending*(1-vesting_fraction)); kept=total-forfeited; forfeiture_fraction=clamp(forfeited/total,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio=1-forfeiture_fraction; safe_fraction=clamp(1-pending/total,0,1) (already-crystallized share). classification NO_FORFEITURE(<=0.05)/MILD(<=0.20)/MODERATE(<=0.50)/SEVERE(>0.50)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realization_ratio+30*safe_fraction,0,100); recommendation EXIT_ANYTIME/MINOR_EXIT_COST/DELAY_EXIT_TO_VEST/AVOID_EARLY_EXIT; flags FULLY_VESTED_EXIT/PENDING_YIELD_AT_RISK/FULL_FORFEITURE/CLIFF_VESTING/LINEAR_VESTING/LONG_COOLDOWN(cooldown_days>=14)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE. done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeGrossOfHarvestBountyBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). An auto-compounding vault pays a recurring HARVEST BOUNTY (a.k.a. caller reward / call fee / harvest tip) to whoever triggers the vault's harvest() transaction each cycle = bounty_rate * harvested_rewards * intervals (a PERCENTAGE cut of the freshly harvested rewards paid as a keeper/caller incentive before the rest is compounded back to depositors -- e.g. Yearn harvest caller reward, Beefy call fee) = a real erosion of the depositor's yield. The vault earns a GROSS yield but the depositor's economically realized yield is net_of_harvest_bounty = gross_yield - harvest_bounty. The vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS yield (before netting the harvest bounty), not on the NET-OF-HARVEST-BOUNTY yield the depositor realized -> the depositor pays a perf fee on the slice of yield the bounty already erased (fee-on-harvest-bounty / fee-base inflation). Metrics: fee_frac=clamp(performance_fee_pct/100,0,1); gross_yield_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; net_of_harvest_bounty_yield_pct (default 0, may be < gross, may be negative); harvest_bounty_consumed_yield_pct=max(0,gross-net); fee_charged_pct=fee_frac*max(0,gross); fair_fee_pct=fee_frac*max(0,net); fee_on_harvest_bounty_gap_pct=max(0,fee_charged-fair); fee_on_harvest_bounty_fraction=clamp(gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio=clamp(net_after_fee/net_fair,0,1). classification CLEAN_NET_OF_HARVEST_BOUNTY_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY_GAP(>0.50 OR net-negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realisation+30*(1-fee_on_harvest_bounty_fraction),0,100); recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY/DEMAND_NET_OF_HARVEST_BOUNTY_BASE/AVOID_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY; flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY/FULL_FEE_ON_HARVEST_BOUNTY/HIGH_HARVEST_BOUNTY(harvest_bounty_cost_pct>=10)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE; grade A-F. Override path: direct fee_on_harvest_bounty_gap_pct + positive fee_charged_pct + positive gross -> verbatim (negative->magnitude), geometry->None, geometry-only flags suppressed, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE, realization_ratio anchored to (1-fee_on_harvest_bounty_fraction). Aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_harvest_bounty_gap_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. DISTINCT axis: the perf-fee BASE being gross-of-harvest-bounty -- distinct from the other gross_of_* perf-fee base-gap modules (cost=FIXED gas/keeper TX flat amount, borrow_cost=lending interest, rebalancing_cost=swap turnover, exit_slippage, reserve_contribution, impermanent_loss, bad_debt_socialization, funding_cost=perpetual funding carry, insurance_premium=recurring cover premium, slashing_loss=one-off slashing penalty, validator_commission=standing validator/node-operator commission, protocol_revenue_share, management_fee -- none is a PERCENTAGE per-harvest caller reward). Key contrast vs gross_of_cost: there a FIXED gas/keeper-TX network cost that does NOT scale with yield, HERE a PERCENTAGE bounty of the harvested rewards that scales with yield; vs gross_of_validator_commission: there the standing validator/node-operator commission on staking rewards, HERE the per-harvest caller reward paid to whoever triggers compounding, independent of any validator. Distinct from the harvest-timing modules (defi_protocol_vault_harvest_timing_analyzer / defi_protocol_vault_harvest_cycle_entry_timing_analyzer / defi_reward_harvesting_optimizer / defi_protocol_yield_harvesting_frequency_optimizer measure WHEN/HOW OFTEN to harvest, HERE the axis is the perf-fee BASE inflation from charging on the gross pre-bounty yield); from hwm/volatility_tax/crystallization_frequency/hurdle_rate_gap/catch_up_clause_gap. Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_gross_of_harvest_bounty_base_gap_log.json, cap 100), no inf/NaN. registry Tier-B yield_quality weight 0.5 (B 477->478, ALL 669->670). Self-authored: no type=code&status=ready task in KANBAN (backlog: agent_infra require git/launchd/Keychain on Mac + USER ACTION/P0-P2; features P3; ideas LOW); orchestrator chose a non-overlapping axis after a catalog grep scan (672 analytics files): the recurring percentage harvest bounty / caller reward existed only as harvest-timing/frequency analyzers, never as a performance-fee base layer (and fixed gas/keeper TX is already covered by gross_of_cost). Architect review NOT due (last completed v8.68 ends in 8, not 0/5). STRICTLY READ-ONLY (SPA-BL-011): risk/execution/monitoring/allocator/cycle_runner.py/golive_checker.py untouched. 91 tests green.

done.title: DeFiProtocolVaultPerformanceFeeGrossOfReferralFeeBaseGapAnalyzer
done.description: Advisory/read-only yield_quality Tier-B (weight 0.5). A vault routes its deposits through a third-party frontend/aggregator/integrator and pays that referrer a recurring REFERRAL FEE (a.k.a. affiliate fee / integrator revenue-share / frontend referral cut) each period = referral_rate * yield * intervals (a PERCENTAGE cut of the depositor's yield skimmed by the referring UI/aggregator/integrator before the remainder reaches the depositor -- e.g. an affiliate share paid to the DeBank/Zapper/wallet frontend that onboarded the deposit) = a real erosion of the depositor's yield. The vault earns a GROSS yield but the depositor's economically realized yield is net_of_referral_fee = gross_yield - referral_fee. The vault charges its PERFORMANCE fee on the GROSS yield (before netting the referral fee), not on the NET-OF-REFERRAL-FEE yield the depositor realized -> the depositor pays a perf fee on the slice of yield the referral fee already erased (fee-on-referral-fee / fee-base inflation). Metrics: fee_frac=clamp(performance_fee_pct/100,0,1); gross_yield_pct REQUIRED finite>0 else INSUFFICIENT_DATA; net_of_referral_fee_yield_pct (default 0, may be < gross, may be negative); referral_fee_consumed_yield_pct=max(0,gross-net); fee_charged_pct=fee_frac*max(0,gross); fair_fee_pct=fee_frac*max(0,net); fee_on_referral_fee_gap_pct=max(0,fee_charged-fair); fee_on_referral_fee_fraction=clamp(gap/fee_charged,0,1) scale-free classification basis; realization_ratio=clamp(net_after_fee/net_fair,0,1). classification CLEAN_NET_OF_REFERRAL_FEE_BASE(<=0.05)/MILD_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE_GAP(<=0.20)/MODERATE_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE_GAP(<=0.50)/SEVERE_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE_GAP(>0.50 OR net-negative)/INSUFFICIENT_DATA; score=clamp(70*realisation+30*(1-fee_on_referral_fee_fraction),0,100); recommendation TRUST_FEE_STRUCTURE/MINOR_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE/DEMAND_NET_OF_REFERRAL_FEE_BASE/AVOID_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE; flags CLEAN_NET_BASE/NET_NEGATIVE_AFTER_FEE/FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE/FULL_FEE_ON_REFERRAL_FEE/HIGH_REFERRAL_FEE(referral_fee_cost_pct>=10)/GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE; grade A-F. Override path: direct fee_on_referral_fee_gap_pct + positive fee_charged_pct + positive gross -> verbatim (negative->magnitude), geometry->None, geometry-only flags suppressed, GAP_FROM_OVERRIDE, realization_ratio anchored to (1-fee_on_referral_fee_fraction). Aggregate cleanest_vault/worst_referral_fee_gap_vault/avg_score/net_negative_count/position_count. DISTINCT axis: the perf-fee BASE being gross-of-referral-fee -- distinct from the other gross_of_* perf-fee base-gap modules (cost=FIXED gas/keeper TX flat amount, borrow_cost=lending interest, rebalancing_cost=swap turnover, exit_slippage, reserve_contribution, impermanent_loss, bad_debt_socialization, funding_cost=perpetual funding carry, insurance_premium=recurring cover premium, slashing_loss=one-off slashing penalty, validator_commission=standing validator/node-operator commission, harvest_bounty=per-harvest caller reward, protocol_revenue_share, management_fee -- none is a recurring PERCENTAGE referral/affiliate fee paid OUTWARD to an external referring frontend/aggregator/integrator). Key contrast vs gross_of_protocol_revenue_share: there the PROTOCOL'S OWN cut of yield to its treasury, HERE a fee paid OUTWARD to an EXTERNAL referring UI/integrator that onboarded the depositor; vs gross_of_harvest_bounty: there the per-harvest keeper/caller reward for triggering compounding, HERE the frontend/aggregator referral cut for routing the deposit, independent of any harvest; vs gross_of_validator_commission: there the standing validator/node-operator commission on staking rewards, HERE the referral fee independent of any validator. From hwm/volatility_tax/crystallization_frequency/hurdle_rate_gap/catch_up_clause_gap. Pure stdlib, atomic ring-buffer log (data/vault_performance_fee_gross_of_referral_fee_base_gap_log.json, cap 100), no inf/NaN. registry Tier-B yield_quality weight 0.5 (B 478->479, ALL 670->671). Self-authored: no type=code&status=ready task in KANBAN (backlog: agent_infra require git/launchd/Keychain on Mac + USER ACTION/P0-P2; features P3; ideas LOW); orchestrator chose a non-overlapping axis after a catalog scan: the recurring percentage referral/affiliate fee paid to an external referring frontend/aggregator existed nowhere as a performance-fee base layer (protocol_revenue_share is the protocol's own inward cut, harvest_bounty is the keeper caller reward). Architect review NOT due (last completed v8.69 ends in 9, not 0/5). STRICTLY READ-ONLY (SPA-BL-011): risk/execution/monitoring/allocator/cycle_runner.py/golive_checker.py untouched. 91 tests green.

done.title: CrossChainOpportunityAnalyzer — BridgeCost matrix, breakeven_days, MOVE/HOLD/MONITOR rec
done.description: spa_core/analytics/cross_chain_opportunity.py: CrossChainOpportunityAnalyzer — анализирует cross-chain yield arbitrage с учётом bridge cost. BridgeCost dataclass (gas_cost_usd, slippage_pct, time_hours, total_cost_usd). 14-entry BRIDGE_COSTS matrix (ETH/ARB/BASE/OPT/POLY). compute_breakeven = bridge_cost / (capital * apy_diff/100 / 365). Pure stdlib, advisory/read-only, SPA-BL-011 compliant.

done.title: WeeklySummaryReport — 7-day aggregation of daily ops reports
done.description: WeeklySummaryReport: агрегирует последние 7 дней из data/daily_ops_report.json (ring-buffer). Dataclasses: WeeklyStats (metric_name, values, avg, min, max, trend: RISING/FALLING/STABLE — last > first+0.1→RISING, last < first-0.1→FALLING, иначе STABLE), WeeklySummaryReportData (generated_at, week_start, week_end, days_covered, apy_stats, operational_days, degraded_days, critical_days, best_day_apy, worst_day_apy, top_chain_this_week, top_chain_apy, weekly_verdict, summary_line). Helpers: _safe_float, _parse_timestamp (Z→+00:00, fromisoformat), _compute_trend, _trend_arrow. WeeklySummaryReport(data_path): load_daily_history()→list[dict] (daily_ops_report.json history, фильтр non-dict, graceful на missing); get_last_7_days(history)→sort ascending by generated_at, tail 7; compute_weekly_stats(values, name)→WeeklyStats; _determine_verdict(avg_apy, op_days): EXCELLENT(>6%+≥5op)/GOOD(>5% OR ≥4op)/FAIR(>4%)/POOR; _extract_top_chain→(chain, avg_apy); generate_report()→WeeklySummaryReportData (0 дней→POOR/нули); save_report()→атомарный tmp+os.replace, ring-buffer 12 в data/weekly_summary.json; format_telegram_message()≤1500 chars (📅 header, verdict emoji, APY avg/min/max/trend, best/worst day, top chain, degraded/critical, trend label); to_dict()→JSON-serializable. CLI: --check/--run/--data-dir. Pure stdlib, 97 tests green.
